title: Marvin Golden
extract: Marvin Golden (born 21 December 1976) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club for Hunslet Parkside ARLFC, the Leeds Rhinos including in 1996's, 1997's, 1998's and 1999's Super League, Bramley (loan), Halifax, the London Broncos in 2001's Super League, the Doncaster Dragons  and the Widnes Vikings in 2003's Super League, he also played for Illawarra Steelers (non-First Grade) in Australia, as a wing, or centre.
